data.title: Magna Mining Acquires Copper Mine Portfolio in Sudbury
data.description:
The latest update is out from Magna Mining ( (TSE:NICU) ).

Magna Mining Inc. has completed the acquisition of a portfolio of base metals assets from KGHM International Ltd., including the McCreedy West copper mine and other past-producing mines in the Sudbury Basin. This strategic acquisition positions Magna as a significant player in the Canadian mining sector, enhancing its operational capacity and growth potential. The company has also assumed certain liabilities and entered a credit facility to support its expanded operations, indicating a robust plan for future development and stakeholder value creation.

More about Magna Mining

Magna Mining Inc. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the production and exploration of base metals such as copper, nickel, and precious metals. The company is positioned in the Sudbury Basin, a region known for its rich mineral deposits, and aims to expand its operations and market presence within Canada.

YTD Price Performance: 12.68%

Average Trading Volume: 282,399

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$248.2M

data.title: Schneider Electric Acquires Controlling Interest in Motivair Corporation
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Schneider Electric ( (FR:SU) ).

Schneider Electric has completed the acquisition of a 75% controlling interest in Motivair Corporation, a company specializing in liquid cooling and advanced thermal management solutions for high-performance computing systems. This acquisition will enhance Schneider Electric’s Energy Management business, with plans to acquire the remaining 25% of Motivair by 2028, strengthening its position in the market for sustainable and efficient energy solutions.

More about Schneider Electric

Schneider Electric is a global leader in the digital transformation of energy management and automation. The company provides integrated end-to-end lifecycle AI-enabled Industrial IoT solutions with connected products, automation, software, and services. Schneider Electric operates in over 100 countries with a focus on sustainability, efficiency, and empowering industries, infrastructure, data centers, buildings, and homes.

YTD Price Performance: -1.85%

Average Trading Volume: 413,881

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: €132B

data.title: Strategic Realty Trust Initiates Liquidation Amid Economic Challenges
data.description:
Strategic Realty Trust ( (SGIC) ) just unveiled an update.

On February 26, 2025, Strategic Realty Trust, Inc. entered into a Liquidation Services Agreement to complete its winding up, terminating its previous advisory agreement. The company filed articles of dissolution on February 27, 2025, following stockholder approval of its liquidation plan. A liquidating distribution was authorized, but economic challenges and specific portfolio issues led to lower-than-expected distributions. The company’s financial condition was adversely impacted by tenant defaults, reduced property values, and high administrative costs, exacerbated by the pandemic and market conditions.

More about Strategic Realty Trust

Strategic Realty Trust, Inc. operates in the commercial real estate industry, focusing on urban retail properties, primarily in California, with a significant concentration in San Francisco. The company has faced challenges due to economic conditions, including inflation, rising interest rates, and the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on its portfolio.

Average Trading Volume: 314

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Hold

Current Market Cap: $860.2K

data.title: J. Smart & Co. Announces Share Capital Details
data.description:
An update from J Smart & Co (Contractors) ( (GB:SMJ) ) is now available.

J. Smart & Co. (Contractors) PLC announced that as of February 28, 2025, its issued share capital comprises 39,034,882 ordinary shares, all with equal voting rights. This information is crucial for shareholders to determine their notification obligations under the FCA’s Disclosure and Transparency Rules, impacting how they manage their interests in the company.

J. Smart & Co. (Contractors) PLC operates in the construction industry, focusing on contracting services. The company is based in Edinburgh and is known for its involvement in various construction projects.

data.title: Ashtead Group Executes Share Buyback as Part of $1.5 Billion Program
data.description:
The latest update is out from Ashtead ( (GB:AHT) ).

Ashtead Group plc has repurchased 60,000 of its ordinary shares as part of its $1.5 billion share repurchase program, with the transaction executed on February 28, 2025. This move is likely to impact the company’s share structure, with 434,837,886 ordinary shares remaining in issue, excluding treasury shares, and may influence shareholder notifications under the Disclosure and Transparency Rules.

More about Ashtead

Ashtead Group plc operates in the equipment rental industry, providing a wide range of construction and industrial equipment for rent. The company primarily serves the construction, industrial, and homeowner markets, focusing on North America and the United Kingdom.

data.title: ITV plc Advances Share Buyback Program with Latest Repurchase
data.description:
ITV plc ( (GB:ITV) ) has shared an announcement.

ITV plc has announced the repurchase of over 2 million of its ordinary shares as part of its ongoing share buyback program, with the intention to cancel these shares. This move is part of a broader strategy initiated in March 2024 to enhance shareholder value, with significant implications for the company’s capital structure and voting rights.

More about ITV plc

ITV plc operates within the media industry, primarily focusing on broadcasting and television production. The company offers a range of services including television programming, broadcasting, and digital media, catering to a diverse audience in the UK and internationally.

data.title: Funding Circle Announces Total Voting Rights Update
data.description:
An announcement from Funding Circle Holdings Limited ( (GB:FCH) ) is now available.

Funding Circle Holdings plc announced that as of 28 February 2025, its issued share capital consists of 321,121,152 ordinary shares, all with voting rights, and holds no shares in Treasury. This information is crucial for shareholders to determine their notification requirements under the Financial Conduct Authority’s Disclosure and Transparency Rules.

More about Funding Circle Holdings Limited

Funding Circle Holdings plc is the UK’s leading SME lending platform, dedicated to providing small businesses with the funding they need through a data and technology-driven customer experience. The platform offers institutional investors access to an alternative asset class in an underserved market, having extended more than £16 billion in credit to approximately 150,000 businesses globally.

data.title: Lacroix Group Sells City-Mobility Segment to SWARCO
data.description:
Lacroix Group SA ( (FR:LACR) ) has issued an announcement.

Lacroix Group SA has finalized the sale of its City-Mobility segment to SWARCO, effective February 28, 2025. This strategic move allows Lacroix to concentrate on its core businesses with strong technological synergies, aiming to become a global leader in industrial IoT solutions and electronic equipment for critical applications. The City-Mobility segment, which includes Traffic and V2X business units, contributed €30.8 million to Lacroix’s turnover in 2024. The sale to SWARCO, a leader in mobility solutions, is expected to create development opportunities and synergies due to the complementarity in geography, technology, and commerce.

More about Lacroix Group SA

Lacroix Group SA is a family-owned SME listed on the stock exchange, with a turnover of €636 million in 2024. The company specializes in designing and manufacturing industrial IoT solutions and electronic equipment for various sectors including automotive, industrial, connected homes and buildings, aerospace and defense, and healthcare. Lacroix is recognized as a leader in electronic subcontracting, ranking in the top 50 worldwide and top 10 in Europe. Additionally, through its Environment activity, Lacroix provides solutions for optimizing water networks, HVAC installations, electrical networks, and public lighting.

YTD Price Performance: -8.93%

Average Trading Volume: 560

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: €37.93M

data.title: PPHE Hotel Group Adjusts Share Capital and Voting Rights
data.description:
PPHE Hotel ( (GB:PPH) ) has shared an announcement.

PPHE Hotel Group has announced a transfer of ordinary shares from treasury, resulting in 2,506,916 shares now held in treasury and a total issued share capital of 44,347,410 shares. This adjustment affects the total number of voting rights, now standing at 41,840,494, which shareholders should use to assess their interests under FCA rules. This move could impact shareholder calculations and company transparency, aligning with regulatory requirements.

More about PPHE Hotel

PPHE Hotel Group is an international hospitality real estate company with a £2.2 billion portfolio, primarily consisting of prime freehold and long leasehold assets in Europe. The company owns, co-owns, develops, leases, operates, and franchises hospitality real estate, including upscale and lifestyle hotels in major cities and resort destinations. PPHE has an exclusive license from Radisson Hotel Group to operate Park Plaza® branded hotels in Europe, the Middle East, and Africa, and also operates under the art’otel® and Arena brands. The company is listed on the London Stock Exchange and holds a controlling interest in Arena Hospitality Group, listed on the Zagreb Stock Exchange.

YTD Price Performance: -7.09%

Average Trading Volume: 33,275

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: £547.4M
